DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
accessibility artifact-reference example extensions guideline link metadata rich-text status usecase
anatomy api component design-specifications state variant
theme token-api token-value token
style
pattern

DSDS Artifact Reference Definitions

A shared definition for referencing other DSDS artifacts by name with an optional role description. Used by patterns to reference components, by styles to reference token groups, and by any future schema that needs to express a named relationship to another artifact.

Source: common/artifact-reference.schema.json

artifactReference

A reference to another DSDS artifact by name, with an optional description of the role it plays in the current context. Used to connect patterns to their participating components, styles to their implementing token groups, and similar cross-artifact relationships.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredThe name of the referenced artifact (e.g., 'button', 'color-text', 'form-field'). MUST match the `name` property of a documented DSDS artifact.
rolestringoptionalA short description of the role this artifact plays in the current context (e.g., 'Primary navigation trigger', 'Error summary container', 'Provides semantic text color tokens'). When omitted, the relationship is a general association without a specific role.
requiredbooleanoptionalWhether this artifact is required for the parent to function correctly. When false or omitted, the artifact is an optional enhancement or supplementary reference.

Example

[
  {
    "name": "button",
    "role": "Primary navigation trigger that submits the form.",
    "required": true
  },
  {
    "name": "alert",
    "role": "Page-level error summary listing all current validation errors.",
    "required": true
  },
  {
    "name": "toast",
    "role": "Transient notification for server-side or asynchronous errors.",
    "required": false
  },
  {
    "name": "color-text",
    "role": "Provides semantic text color tokens for body, secondary, and tertiary text."
  },
  {
    "name": "spacing",
    "role": "Provides all spatial tokens from space-0 through space-12."
  },
  {
    "name": "icon-button"
  }
]
↑ Back to top
